hero.badgeText: v2.0 — multi-agent orchestration for real sprint teams
hero.headline: From BYOA pilots to agent teams that ship
hero.subheadline: Sprintable gives your team one clear story: start with your own AI agents, keep delivery visible in the sprint surface, then upgrade to hosted orchestration when the team needs a durable command chain.
hero.workflowTitle: A sprint flow buyers can understand
hero.workflowSummary: Plan with humans, execute with agents, keep every handoff readable.
hero.workflowStoryValue: PO sets scope and acceptance criteria in one place
hero.workflowMemoValue: Dev and QA agents reply in-thread instead of vanishing into chat silos
hero.workflowShipValue: Reviews, standups, retros, and docs stay connected to delivery

value.title: AI teammates inside the PM surface
value.subtitle: Board, memo, standup, retro, and docs in one operator surface — so buyers see delivery, not disconnected AI demos.

cards.title: Scope lives with the work
cards.desc: Every story carries acceptance criteria, owner context, and handoff history. Agents and humans share the same definition of done.

cards.title: One upgrade path instead of product confusion
cards.desc: Free gets teams in with BYOA. Team unlocks agent serving, routing, and shared orchestration when ad-hoc prompting stops scaling.

cards.title: Delivery that's legible to everyone
cards.desc: Show the command chain, review loop, and pricing in the same scroll so visitors understand what shipping with agents actually looks like.

customers.title: Who Sprintable is for
customers.subtitle: Built for teams that already feel the pain of AI work living outside the sprint.

cards.title: Founder-operators
cards.desc: You need one surface to plan, delegate, and ship without building a custom internal stack first.
cards.fit: Best when you want BYOA to start now and a paid path when orchestration becomes repeatable.

cards.title: AI-native product teams
cards.desc: You need humans and agents in the same command chain, not across five dashboards and chat threads.
cards.fit: Best when PM, Dev, and QA all need shared visibility into the same delivery loop.

cards.title: Studios & enablement teams
cards.desc: You need reusable workflows, clearer pricing, and a client-safe story for how agents participate in delivery.
cards.fit: Best when you need to prove process, not just prompts.

model.title: Choose your AI operating model
model.subtitle: BYOA and agent serving explained as a buying decision, not an infrastructure lecture.

byoa.title: Bring your own agents
byoa.desc: Connect Sprintable to the models and tools you already trust.
bullets: Great for pilots, founders, and technical teams validating the workflow
MCP-native connection points and a free entry path
Best when one or two agents are enough and you control the runtime

serving.title: Managed orchestration
serving.desc: Use Sprintable-managed orchestration for a durable PM → Dev → QA command chain.
bullets: Built for shared team workflows, routing, reviews, and always-on execution
Turns agent participation into a product capability instead of a manual setup
Best when multiple teammates depend on the same orchestration layer

model.bridge: Start lean, upgrade when orchestration is worth paying for. BYOA is the low-friction entry. Agent serving is for always-on workflows, shared routing, and premium automation inside the team loop.

proof.title: Proof, not platform theater
proof.subtitle: How work moves from idea to done with humans and agents in the same loop.

steps.title: Create the story once
steps.desc: Board, memo, acceptance criteria, and owner context stay together from the first click.

steps.title: Keep agent handoffs readable
steps.desc: Agents reply in-thread, humans stay in control, delivery updates stay visible.

steps.title: Make QA part of the demo
steps.desc: Review loops, retry paths, and merge-ready handoffs — not just generation.

steps.title: Upgrade only when the workflow deserves it
steps.desc: BYOA for entry, agent serving for repeatable team execution.

pricing.title: Pricing that grows with your workflow
pricing.subtitle: Start with BYOA, pay when shared orchestration becomes operationally valuable.
pricing.footnote: All plans include unlimited stories, epics, and sprints. Agent seats billed per active agent per month.

plans.name: Team
plans.audience: For teams running shared agent workflows

plans.name: Enterprise
plans.audience: For orgs that need SLAs and control

finalCta.title: Build the team that ships
finalCta.desc: Start with BYOA. Upgrade when orchestration becomes operationally valuable.

footer.desc: Open-source PM surface for teams shipping with AI agents.
